response.reasoning: Candidate has 15+ years of software development experience, well exceeding the 6+ year requirement. Strong full-stack background with TypeScript, Node.js, React (at Optilyz, RIDE, re:cinq). Current role at re:cinq involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, directly matching the AI agent development requirement. Has experience with MongoDB, AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes, Git, and TDD practices. Java experience from Altom Consulting matches secondary stack. No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest, though TypeScript/Node.js depth suggests quick ramp-up. No PostgreSQL mentioned explicitly (MongoDB and MySQL covered). Has CS degree. Strong community/teaching background (workshops, talks). Founder of GISCollective shows ownership and end-to-end delivery. Overall a very strong match for a Senior Fullstack role with AI tooling focus.
strengths: 15+ years full-stack experience with TypeScript/Node.js/React across multiple senior roles
Current AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generator work directly matches AI agent requirement
Strong engineering craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in resume
Vitest not listed; testing experience appears via TDD/Selenium/Fluent-Asserts rather than the specified framework
PostgreSQL not mentioned (MongoDB and MySQL only)
response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer whose current role at re:cinq aligns precisely with the job's AI-agent and internal tooling focus, with deep TypeScript/Node.js/React experience and a strong engineering-craftsmanship track record. Gaps around Nest.js and Vitest are minor and easily bridged given the demonstrated polyglot adaptability.
